mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dev_inout_category WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dev_inout_category (name, type, sort, del_flag, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{sort}, '0', #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE dev_inout_category SET del_flag = '2' WHERE id = #{id}
